/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic  -g CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/home/jstar/Desktop/github-nos3/components/sample/fsw/src/sample_device.c.o CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/home/jstar/Desktop/github-nos3/fsw/apps/hwlib/sim/src/libuart.c.o CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/home/jstar/Desktop/github-nos3/fsw/apps/hwlib/sim/src/libcan.c.o CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/home/jstar/Desktop/github-nos3/fsw/apps/hwlib/sim/src/libi2c.c.o CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/home/jstar/Desktop/github-nos3/fsw/apps/hwlib/sim/src/libspi.c.o CMakeFiles/sample_checkout.dir/home/jstar/Desktop/github-nos3/fsw/apps/hwlib/sim/src/nos_link.c.o -o sample_checkout  -lnos_engine_common -lnos_engine_transport -lnos_engine_client -lnos_engine_uart -lnos_engine_can -lnos_engine_i2c -lnos_engine_spi
